body_preview: - Issue #37: "Add held-out coding eval coverage for DeepSeek harness gnomes" — OPEN, requesting eval fixtures for FIM routing, prompt layout determinism, transport error recovery, cache behavior, and state event coverage. - Trajectory: `fitness_score=unknown` — we cannot quantify capability because no held-out coding eval fixtures generate gnome scores. - As
expected_evidence: The `fitness_score` gnome moves from "unknown" toward a measurable value in future trajectory reports. `yyds eval fixtures list` shows the new fixture in the local-smoke suite. Task lineage shows the new fixture file as the changed artifact. Detailed description: The implementation agent should create a new eval fixture at `eval/fixtures/local-smoke/373-deep
title: Add a coding eval fixture for DeepSeek FIM edit quality
